column1: #   sample      unique id (e.g. DN_rep1). Leave blank for Hi-C-only conditions.
#   out         per-sample qcat output name (BEARING rows only)
#   bw          comma-separated BigWigs in panel order:
#   cool,insul,pca1   OPTIONAL Hi-C inputs, per condition, with a {res}
#   loops       OPTIONAL per-condition Mustache loop BEDPE (merged across
#               resolutions; no {res}). Shown as arcs on Hi-C figures.
#               placeholder for resolution. Fill once per condition (rep1 row).
#               Leave all three blank to run BEARING without Hi-C.
# Rows with a non-empty bw are BEARING samples (scored). Rows with non-empty
# cool define Hi-C conditions (used by the Hi-C analyses and figures). A
# condition may have both (DN..S3T3) or be Hi-C-only (dV1P, dV1CTCF).
# --- dV1P / dV1CTCF temporarily disabled: their Hi-C files are not present at
#     all required resolutions yet. Re-enable by removing the leading '#' on the
#     two rows below once the files exist.
